zh.Leuven, , , Vlaams-Brabant, Belgium: 比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie van Brabant-Perwijs於1237年出生在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文時，她的父親Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs40歲，母親Adelheid Berthout30歲。她於1255年3月17日與Philipp I. von Vianden結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1289年9月15日享年52歲。

zh-hans.Leuven, , , Vlaams-Brabant, Belgium: 比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie van Brabant-Perwijs于1237年出生在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文时，她的父亲Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs40岁，母亲Adelheid Berthout30岁。她于1255年3月17日与Philipp I. von Vianden结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1289年9月15日享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie van Brabant-Perwijs was born in 1237, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, her father, Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs, was 40 and her mother, Adelheid Berthout, was 30. She married Philipp I. von Vianden on 17 March 1255. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 15 September 1289, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie van Brabant-Perwijs est née en 1237, à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, son père, Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Adelheid Berthout, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Philipp I. von Vianden le 17 mars 1255. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 septembre 1289, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie van Brabant-Perwijs 1237 in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs 40 und ihre Mutter Adelheid Berthout 30. Sie hat am 17. März 1255 Philipp I. von Vianden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. September 1289 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie van Brabant-Perwijs è nata il nel 1237 nel Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, sua padre, Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Adelheid Berthout, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Philipp I. von Vianden il 17 marzo 1255. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 15 settembre 1289, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie van Brabant-Perwijsが1237年にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンで生まれた時，父Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijsは40歳，母Adelheid Berthoutは30歳であった。1255年3月17日にPhilipp I. von Viandenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1289年9月15日に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie van Brabant-Perwijs(이)가 1237년 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid Berthout(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1255년 3월 17일 Philipp I. von Vianden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1289년 9월 15일 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie van Brabant-Perwijs nasceu em 1237, em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, seu pai, Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid Berthout, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Philipp I. von Vianden em 17 de março de 1255. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1289, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie van Brabant-Perwijs родилась в 1237 г. в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid Berthout, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philipp I. von Vianden 17 марта 1255 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 15 сентября 1289 г. в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie van Brabant-Perwijs nació en 1237, en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, su papá, Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Adelheid Berthout, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Philipp I. von Vianden el 17 de marzo de 1255. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1289, a la edad de 52 años.
